title: I can't believe it's not Optifine!
description: Modpack designed to be very close to the Optifine experience.
body:
## It's just like Optifine!
This is a modpack designed to be very close to the Optifine experience for users struggling to move pass from Optifine.
### Features - Zoom (and how it feels!) - Fast grass settings - Optifine Smart Leaves - Control over what animations run - Optifine specific features that relate to Optifine texturepacks - Shader support - Optifine donator capes (other types of cape services too) - etc. ### Differences? - Better performance than Optifine Thats pretty much it Beta = minimal mods temporarily removed until updated to modpack version (QOL mods, not-significant performance mods)
Alpha = important performance and QOL mods removed until updated to modpack version **Donate to the authors that made the mods in the modpack over me!
**
